title: El Tercer Espacio
overview: Celebrating 50 years of the metro as a crucial social space, this documentary delves into its transformation from a simple means of transport to a vibrant hub of diversity and social connection. Through a rich tapestry of historical images, personal testimonies, and expert analysis, it showcases the metro's profound impact on urban life. The film also explores future plans and improvements, ensuring the metro remains a vital part of the community for years to come.
